configurations.description: Enables the capture of experimental JVM runtime metrics.
configurations.name: otel.instrumentation.runtime-telemetry.emit-experimental-metrics

configurations.description: Prefers JFR over JMX for metrics where both collection methods are available (Java 17+).
configurations.name: otel.instrumentation.runtime-telemetry.experimental.prefer-jfr

configurations.description: Enables creating events for JAR libraries used by the application.
configurations.name: otel.instrumentation.runtime-telemetry.experimental.package-emitter.enabled

configurations.description: The number of JAR files processed per second by the package emitter.
configurations.name: otel.instrumentation.runtime-telemetry.experimental.package-emitter.jars-per-second

description: This instrumentation enables JVM runtime metrics using JMX (Java 8+) and JFR (Java 17+) to monitor CPU, memory, garbage collection, threads, classes, buffer pools, and file descriptors.
name: runtime-telemetry

metrics.description: Number of buffers in the pool.
metrics.name: jvm.buffer.count

metrics.description: Measure of total memory capacity of buffers.
metrics.name: jvm.buffer.memory.limit

metrics.description: Measure of memory used by buffers.
metrics.name: jvm.buffer.memory.used

metrics.description: Number of classes currently loaded.
metrics.name: jvm.class.count

metrics.description: Number of classes loaded since JVM start.
metrics.name: jvm.class.loaded

metrics.description: Number of classes unloaded since JVM start.
metrics.name: jvm.class.unloaded

metrics.description: Number of processors available to the Java virtual machine.
metrics.name: jvm.cpu.count

metrics.description: Long lock times
metrics.name: jvm.cpu.longlock

metrics.description: Recent CPU utilization for the process as reported by the JVM.
metrics.name: jvm.cpu.recent_utilization

metrics.description: CPU time used by the process as reported by the JVM.
metrics.name: jvm.cpu.time

metrics.description: Duration of JVM garbage collection actions.
metrics.name: jvm.gc.duration

metrics.description: Measure of memory committed.
metrics.name: jvm.memory.committed

metrics.description: Measure of initial memory requested.
metrics.name: jvm.memory.init

metrics.description: Measure of max obtainable memory.
metrics.name: jvm.memory.limit

metrics.description: Measure of memory used.
metrics.name: jvm.memory.used

metrics.description: Measure of memory used, as measured after the most recent garbage collection event on this pool.
metrics.name: jvm.memory.used_after_last_gc

metrics.description: Recent CPU utilization for the whole system as reported by the JVM.
metrics.name: jvm.system.cpu.utilization

metrics.description: Number of executing platform threads.
metrics.name: jvm.thread.count

metrics.description: Number of buffers in the pool.
metrics.name: jvm.buffer.count

metrics.description: Measure of total memory capacity of buffers.
metrics.name: jvm.buffer.memory.limit

metrics.description: Measure of memory used by buffers.
metrics.name: jvm.buffer.memory.used

metrics.description: Number of classes currently loaded.
metrics.name: jvm.class.count

metrics.description: Number of classes loaded since JVM start.
metrics.name: jvm.class.loaded

metrics.description: Number of classes unloaded since JVM start.
metrics.name: jvm.class.unloaded

metrics.description: Number of processors available to the Java virtual machine.
metrics.name: jvm.cpu.count

metrics.description: Recent CPU utilization for the process as reported by the JVM.
metrics.name: jvm.cpu.recent_utilization

metrics.description: CPU time used by the process as reported by the JVM.
metrics.name: jvm.cpu.time

metrics.description: Number of open file descriptors as reported by the JVM.
metrics.name: jvm.file_descriptor.count

metrics.description: Measure of max open file descriptors as reported by the JVM.
metrics.name: jvm.file_descriptor.limit

metrics.description: Duration of JVM garbage collection actions.
metrics.name: jvm.gc.duration

metrics.description: Measure of memory committed.
metrics.name: jvm.memory.committed

metrics.description: Measure of initial memory requested.
metrics.name: jvm.memory.init

metrics.description: Measure of max obtainable memory.
metrics.name: jvm.memory.limit

metrics.description: Measure of memory used.
metrics.name: jvm.memory.used

metrics.description: Measure of memory used, as measured after the most recent garbage collection event on this pool.
metrics.name: jvm.memory.used_after_last_gc

metrics.description: Average CPU load of the whole system for the last minute as reported by the JVM.
metrics.name: jvm.system.cpu.load_1m

metrics.description: Recent CPU utilization for the whole system as reported by the JVM.
metrics.name: jvm.system.cpu.utilization

metrics.description: Number of executing platform threads.
metrics.name: jvm.thread.count
